notes: HAR-321 live fixture captures Admin GraphQL 2025-01 schema/payload evidence for quantityPricingByVariantUpdate, quantityRulesAdd, quantityRulesDelete, unknown price-list and unknown-variant validation branches, and downstream PriceList.quantityRules / PriceList.prices.quantityPriceBreaks reads. The flow is enforced by the Markets lifecycle runtime test because it is multi-step local staging with setup, staged reads, and cleanup rather than a single generic parity request.
